title: Smoky Chickpea Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry made with chickpeas and smoky sauce. Serve over rice or noodles for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the chickpeas, smoky sauce, and gochujang (if using) to the skillet.
Stir-fry everything together for about 2-3 minutes, until the sauce has thickened and the chickpeas are coated.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or noodles, garnished with chopped green onions or sesame seeds if desired.
